title: eragrostis spicata
intro: Eragrostis spicata, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial bunchgrass native to the Great Plains in North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Eragrostis spicata include its ability to support respiratory health and reduce the severity of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis spicata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
